title: Galaktoboureko Cheesecake Bars
description: A Greek-inspired dessert featuring a creamy cheesecake filling wrapped in flaky phyllo pastry, just like the traditional galaktoboureko.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
Beat in eggs one at a time, followed by vanilla extract.
Arrange phyllo sheets on a flat surface, brushing with melted butter between each layer.
Cut phyllo into desired bar size and spoon a dollop of cheesecake mixture onto the center of each sheet.
Fold the phyllo in half to enclose the filling, pressing edges to seal.
Place bars on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
While bars are baking, prepare a syrup by mixing galaktoboureko syrup and water in a small bowl.
Remove bars from oven and brush with syrup while still warm.
Serve warm with sliced bananas on top.
